hook: Social confidence grows from repeated evidence that you can enter uncertainty and stay present.
body: Your nervous system learns safety through experience, not through endless private analysis.

hook: Waiting to feel ready before taking reps keeps confidence trapped behind a door it can only unlock by moving.
body: Action produces familiarity; familiarity produces steadiness.

hook: Action produces familiarity; familiarity produces steadiness.
body: Five small interactions in normal life often build more real confidence than one grand gesture you overprepare for.

hook: Five small interactions in normal life often build more real confidence than one grand gesture you overprepare for.
body: Build a weekly rep ladder: greeting, short chat, light joke, opinion, invite.
